findings.problem: The reported 0.94 AUC is computed on the same 200 scans used to tune the threshold; there is no held-out test set.
findings.why: Threshold tuning on the evaluation data leaks label information and inflates AUC; the headline result is not trustworthy.
findings.fix: Report AUC on a pre-registered external or temporally split test set never seen during tuning.
